name: Birman Wood & Hardware Ltd
summary: Birman Wood & Hardware Ltd imports, produces, and markets wood panels, hardware products, kitchen electrical appliances, and laminate flooring parquets in Israel. The company offers wood products, including plywood, MDF, chipboard, hardboard, flexboard, pine edge glued panel, panel for construction and decoration, solid lumber, and light weight panel products, as well as various design products with special overlays. It also imports and markets professional and decorative hardware products for furniture branches; imports, fabricates, and installs products made of solid surface, such as kitchen tops, bathrooms, and sinks and projects in the healthcare, food, and offices sectors; and supplies kitchen electric appliances, such as refrigerators, ovens, hobs, cooker hoods, coffee machines, and dishwashers under the Fulgor Milano, Bellini, and Best brands. The company was founded in 1932 and is based in Tiberias, Israel.
